title: Increased Security at New Heights Middle School After Threats
summary: CCSO increases presence at New Heights after a student made threats. No active threat confirmed.
charlotte_impact: Ensuring student safety and addressing parental concerns following potential threats is paramount for community well-being.

title: Murder Investigation Underway in East Charlotte
summary: A suspect has been charged with murder after a woman was found dead following a welfare check. Victim not yet identified.
charlotte_impact: A murder investigation raises serious concerns about public safety and requires swift action from law enforcement.

title: Record Heatwave Sweeping Through the Region
summary: Record-shattering heat on Wednesday, followed by a return to average March weather after Thursday's rain.
charlotte_impact: Extreme weather events can impact public health and infrastructure, requiring preparedness and adaptation strategies.

title: Doctors Offer Tips for Managing Spring Allergies
summary: Doctors provide advice on tackling spring allergies as pollen levels rise with blooming trees.
charlotte_impact: Seasonal allergies affect many residents, and medical advice can help them manage symptoms and improve quality of life.

title: Stein Challenges Presidential Tariff Authority After Court Ruling
summary: Stein calls on Congress to reassert tariff power following a Supreme Court ruling limiting presidential authority.
charlotte_impact: The balance of power between the executive and legislative branches impacts trade policy and economic stability.

title: Sycamore Brewing Reopening with New Name and Owner
summary: Sycamore Brewing is reopening this weekend as Club West Brewing with a new owner taking over.
charlotte_impact: Local businesses contribute to the economy and community identity, and their success is important for local vitality.

title: Queen City Quarter Expected to Hit the Market
summary: Queen City Quarter, formerly EpiCentre, in Charlotte is expected to be listed for sale in the next month.
charlotte_impact: Real estate developments shape the urban landscape and influence economic growth and community spaces.

title: Larson Favored in Las Vegas NASCAR Race
summary: Kyle Larson is the favorite in Sunday's Pennzoil 400 at Las Vegas Motor Speedway.
charlotte_impact: Sports events generate excitement and contribute to the entertainment industry, attracting fans and boosting tourism.

title: Durham Man Charged with Charlotte Bank Robberies
summary: Stephen Ford charged with 3 bank robberies in Charlotte, stealing over $13,000 between Feb. 27 and March 10.
charlotte_impact: Bank robberies threaten financial security and public safety, requiring law enforcement to apprehend perpetrators.

title: Fort Mill School Board Seeks State Intervention After Chemical Incidents
summary: Fort Mill School Board asks state to intervene after chemical incidents at Silfab Solar, emphasizing student safety.
charlotte_impact: Chemical incidents near schools raise concerns about environmental hazards and the need for stricter safety regulations.

title: Six Years After COVID-19 Outbreak: What Has Changed?
summary: Doctors say the virus is in its endemic phase. Here's what that means for the community.
charlotte_impact: Understanding the current state of the pandemic helps inform public health strategies and individual precautions.

title: Data Center Proposal Sparks Debate in East Charlotte
summary: A rezoning petition for a 58-acre plot on Hood Road proposes a 40,000 sq ft data storage facility.
charlotte_impact: Data centers impact local infrastructure and energy consumption, sparking discussions about regulation and land use.

title: Berger–Page Race Remains Close
summary: The Berger-Page race remains razor thin with no military ballots received so far in Guilford and Rockingham counties.
charlotte_impact: Every vote counts in close elections, and ensuring all ballots are properly counted is crucial for democratic integrity.

title: Gaston County Acquires First Drone Van
summary: Gaston County gets its first drone van, acquired with a $375,000 donation from QuikTrip.
charlotte_impact: Technological advancements in law enforcement can improve efficiency and effectiveness in emergency response.

title: Man Drowns in Lake Norman Kayaking Accident
summary: A man drowns after falling from a kayak on Lake Norman. Investigators did not release the victim's name.
charlotte_impact: Water safety is crucial, and accidents like this highlight the importance of precautions and awareness.
